import Dangerous from './Dangerous';

# Grove OLED Display

<Dangerous execute={() => fetch('http://127.0.0.1')} />

## Parameters

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Supply | 5 volts |

## Pin Map

- SDA: I2C data
- SCL: I2C clock

## Getting Started with Arduino

Use the documented I2C address.
